law.text:
Article 1. Definitions

par. 1. For the purposes of this Act, the following definitions apply:

(1) alien: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

(3) third-country national: any person who is not a Union citizen and who is not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement, as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

(4) illegal stay: the presence on the territory of an alien who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

(11) risk of absconding: the fact that there are reasons to believe that an alien who is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection, will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

(14) identified alien: any alien:
(a) who is in possession of a valid travel document, a valid passport, or a valid identity document; or
(b) who has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer; or
(c) who falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

par. 2. The risk of absconding referred to in paragraph 1, (11), must be current and real. It shall be established following an individual examination and on the basis of one or more of the following objective criteria, taking into account all circumstances specific to each case:

(1) The person concerned has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay, or has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by this Act.

(2) The person concerned has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry, or has committed fraud or used other unlawful means.

(3) The person concerned does not cooperate or has not cooperated in the context of their relations with the authorities responsible for the implementation of and/or supervision of compliance with the regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

(4) The person concerned has made clear that they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, one of the following measures:
(a) a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure;
(b) an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended;
(c) a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, regardless of whether it is a liberty-restricting measure or another measure;
(d) a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security;
(e) a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the measures referred to in (a), (b), (c), or (d).

(5) The person concerned is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

(6) The person concerned has, immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence or a decision terminating their stay, or immediately after having been the subject of a refusal of entry or removal measure, submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection.

(7) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

(8) The person concerned has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

(9) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

(10) The person concerned has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

(11) The person concerned is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality: Person -> Bool
  is_union_citizen: Person -> Bool
  enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement: Person -> Bool
  meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_passport: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_identity_document: Person -> Bool
  recognised_as_national_by_national_authority: Person -> Bool
  national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer: Person -> Bool
  falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  criterion_1_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_false_information_or_documents: Person -> Bool
  criterion_3_non_cooperation_with_authorities: Person -> Bool
  criterion_4a_non_compliance_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure: Person -> Bool
  criterion_4b_non_compliance_with_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  criterion_4c_non_compliance_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  criterion_4d_non_compliance_with_liberty_restricting_measure: Person -> Bool
  criterion_4e_non_compliance_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state: Person -> Bool
  criterion_5_subject_to_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  criterion_6_new_application_after_negative_decision: Person -> Bool
  criterion_7_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  criterion_8_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome: Person -> Bool
  criterion_9_concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  criterion_10_came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application: Person -> Bool
  criterion_11_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
  reasons_to_believe_will_abscond: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_relevant_procedure: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  is_alien: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  has_illegal_stay: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_alien: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding_exists: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((~provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality(p))) => ((is_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((~is_union_citizen(p)) & (~enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement(p)))) => ((is_third_country_national(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (~meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay(p)))) => ((has_illegal_stay(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (possesses_valid_travel_document(p)))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (possesses_valid_passport(p)))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (possesses_valid_identity_document(p)))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (recognised_as_national_by_national_authority(p)) & (national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer(p)))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category(p)))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_removal_procedure(p))) => ((subject_to_relevant_procedure(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_international_protection_procedure(p))) => ((subject_to_relevant_procedure(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure(p))) => ((subject_to_relevant_procedure(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_1_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_2_false_information_or_documents(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_3_non_cooperation_with_authorities(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_4a_non_compliance_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_4b_non_compliance_with_entry_ban(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_4c_non_compliance_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_4d_non_compliance_with_liberty_restricting_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_4e_non_compliance_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_5_subject_to_entry_ban(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_6_new_application_after_negative_decision(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_7_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_8_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_9_concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_10_came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((criterion_11_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((absconding_criterion_met(p)) & (individual_examination_performed(p)))) => ((reasons_to_believe_will_abscond(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (subject_to_relevant_procedure(p)) & (reasons_to_believe_will_abscond(p)) & (individual_examination_performed(p)) & (absconding_criterion_met(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding_exists(p))).
}

case.text: Ahmed cannot prove that he possesses Belgian nationality.

questions.text: Does Ahmed fall under the definition of an alien in Article 1, paragraph 1, point 1?

expected.reason: A foreigner is anyone who does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay.name: meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay
meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay.description: The person meets or continues to meet the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document.

possesses_valid_passport.name: possesses_valid_passport
possesses_valid_passport.description: The person is in possession of a valid passport.

possesses_valid_identity_document.name: possesses_valid_identity_document
possesses_valid_identity_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_national_autho.name: recognised_as_national_by_national_authority
recognised_as_national_by_national_autho.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

national_authority_willing_to_issue_lais.name: national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
national_authority_willing_to_issue_lais.description: The national authority of the person's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

criterion_1_no_residence_application_aft.name: criterion_1_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
criterion_1_no_residence_application_aft.description: The person did not submit a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not make an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

criterion_2_false_information_or_documen.name: criterion_2_false_information_or_documents
criterion_2_false_information_or_documen.description: The person used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents, or committed fraud or used other unlawful means, in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

criterion_3_non_cooperation_with_authori.name: criterion_3_non_cooperation_with_authorities
criterion_3_non_cooperation_with_authori.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

criterion_4a_non_compliance_with_transfe.name: criterion_4a_non_compliance_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
criterion_4a_non_compliance_with_transfe.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

criterion_4b_non_compliance_with_entry_b.name: criterion_4b_non_compliance_with_entry_ban
criterion_4b_non_compliance_with_entry_b.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_4c_non_compliance_with_less_co.name: criterion_4c_non_compliance_with_less_coercive_measure
criterion_4c_non_compliance_with_less_co.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

criterion_4d_non_compliance_with_liberty.name: criterion_4d_non_compliance_with_liberty_restricting_measure
criterion_4d_non_compliance_with_liberty.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

criterion_4e_non_compliance_with_equival.name: criterion_4e_non_compliance_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state
criterion_4e_non_compliance_with_equival.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

criterion_5_subject_to_entry_ban.name: criterion_5_subject_to_entry_ban
criterion_5_subject_to_entry_ban.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_6_new_application_after_negati.name: criterion_6_new_application_after_negative_decision
criterion_6_new_application_after_negati.description: The person submitted a new residence application or new application for international protection immediately after being subject to a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

criterion_7_concealed_fingerprints_in_ot.name: criterion_7_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
criterion_7_concealed_fingerprints_in_ot.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed the fact that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an application for international protection.

criterion_8_multiple_applications_with_n.name: criterion_8_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
criterion_8_multiple_applications_with_n.description: The person submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, and those applications gave rise to a negative decision or did not result in a residence permit.

criterion_9_concealed_prior_protection_a.name: criterion_9_concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state
criterion_9_concealed_prior_protection_a.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another Dublin-bound State.

criterion_10_came_for_purposes_other_tha.name: criterion_10_came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
criterion_10_came_for_purposes_other_tha.description: The person declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

criterion_11_fined_for_manifestly_unlawf.name: criterion_11_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
criterion_11_fined_for_manifestly_unlawf.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.description: There are reasons to believe the person will abscond, based on one or more objective criteria from paragraph 2.

subject_to_relevant_procedure.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
subject_to_relevant_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a Dublin transfer procedure.

absconding_criterion_met.name: absconding_criterion_met
absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the person.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

has_illegal_stay.name: has_illegal_stay
has_illegal_stay.description: The person has illegal stay: they are an alien who does not meet or no longer meets the conditions for entry or stay on the territory.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The person is an identified alien under one of the three statutory identification grounds.

risk_of_absconding_exists.name: risk_of_absconding_exists
risk_of_absconding_exists.description: A risk of absconding exists for the person, established following individual examination and based on at least one objective criterion, in the context of a relevant procedure.

routing.question: Does Ahmed fall under the definition of an alien in Article 1, paragraph 1, point 1?

symbolic_intent_routing.question: Does Ahmed fall under the definition of an alien in Article 1, paragraph 1, point 1?

pipeline.natural_language: Yes. Ahmed: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.
